---
title: "Resources"
description: "Curated tools, databases, and learning resources for computational scientists"
toc: true
---

A curated collection of open resources I find useful in my daily research. Contributions and suggestions welcome — [open an issue](https://github.com/himanshu-goel).

---

## Molecular & chemical databases

| Database | Description | Link |
|----------|-------------|------|
| **ChEMBL** | Bioactivity data for drug-like molecules | [chembl.ebi.ac.uk](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/) |
| **PubChem** | Chemical structures, properties, bioassays | [pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov](https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/) |
| **ZINC** | Commercially available compounds for docking | [zinc.docking.org](https://zinc.docking.org/) |
| **DrugBank** | Drug targets, interactions, pharmacology | [drugbank.com](https://www.drugbank.com/) |
| **BindingDB** | Measured protein-ligand binding affinities | [bindingdb.org](https://www.bindingdb.org/) |
| **PDB** | Experimental protein structures | [rcsb.org](https://www.rcsb.org/) |
| **UniProt** | Protein sequences and functional annotation | [uniprot.org](https://www.uniprot.org/) |

---

## Toxicology & safety resources

| Resource | Description | Link |
|----------|-------------|------|
| **ToxCast / CompTox** | EPA HTS data for 10,000+ chemicals | [comptox.epa.gov](https://comptox.epa.gov/) |
| **hERG Central** | Curated hERG activity database | [chembl](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/) |
| **vNN-ADMET** | ADMET prediction server | [vnnadmet.bhsai.org](https://vnnadmet.bhsai.org/) |
| **SwissADME** | ADME/drug-likeness predictor | [swissadme.ch](http://www.swissadme.ch/) |
| **ADMETlab 2.0** | Comprehensive ADMET evaluation | [admetmesh.scbdd.com](https://admetmesh.scbdd.com/) |
| **DSSTox** | Distributed Structure Searchable Toxicity DB | [comptox.epa.gov](https://comptox.epa.gov/dashboard) |

---

## Key Python libraries

| Library | Use | Install |
|---------|-----|---------|
| **RDKit** | Cheminformatics swiss-army knife | `conda install -c conda-forge rdkit` |
| **DeepChem** | ML for drug discovery | `pip install deepchem` |
| **MDAnalysis** | MD trajectory analysis | `pip install MDAnalysis` |
| **OpenMM** | GPU MD simulations | `conda install -c conda-forge openmm` |
| **py3Dmol** | 3D molecular visualization | `pip install py3Dmol` |
| **LangChain** | LLM application framework | `pip install langchain` |
| **LangGraph** | Agentic AI workflows | `pip install langgraph` |
| **biopython** | Bioinformatics utilities | `pip install biopython` |
| **pydeseq2** | DESeq2 in Python | `pip install pydeseq2` |

---

## Learning resources

### Computational drug discovery
- [TeachOpenCADD](https://github.com/volkamerlab/teachopencadd) — Jupyter notebook tutorials on CADD
- [Practical Cheminformatics](https://practicalcheminformatics.blogspot.com/) — Pat Walters' excellent blog
- [SILCS documentation](https://silcsbio.com/) — Official SILCS methodology resources

### Agentic AI & LLMs
- [LangChain docs](https://python.langchain.com/)
- [LangGraph documentation](https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/)
- [DeepLearning.AI short courses](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/) — Agentic AI, RAG, tool-use

### Bioinformatics
- [Bioconductor workflows](https://www.bioconductor.org/help/workflows/)
- [DESeq2 vignette](https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/vignettes/DESeq2/inst/doc/DESeq2.html)
- [Harvard Chan Bioinformatics Core training](https://hbctraining.github.io/main/)

### Molecular dynamics
- [CHARMM-GUI](https://www.charmm-gui.org/) — System builder for MD simulations
- [GROMACS tutorials](http://www.mdtutorials.com/gmx/)
- [OpenMM documentation](https://openmm.org/)

---

## Recommended books

- *Introduction to Computational Chemistry* — Frank Jensen
- *The Art of Drug Synthesis* — Johnson & Li
- *Bioinformatics Algorithms* — Compeau & Pevzner (free online)
- *Deep Learning for the Life Sciences* — Bharath Ramsundar et al. (O'Reilly)
